titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/301

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=341 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:27:55.180503+00 | translation moa=342 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:28:21.288289+00

div.p:
Omnibus hoc scriptum visuris uel audituris Robertus filius Alexandri de Lundr’
salutem in domino . Noueritis me concessisse et hac presenti carta me confirmasse
deo et ecclesie beate Marie de Melros et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus . in liberam
puram et perpetuam elemosinam  illam donacionem quam pater meus eis fecit de
terra sua sita in Lekehalu que ei data fuit a Waltero de Burdun et Mabilla
uxore eius in eschambium . prout carta patris mei testatur . Ego uero et here
des mei totam predictam terram cum omnibus libertatibus et asiamentis suis . dictis monachis
contra omnes homines ac feminas warentizabimus ac defendemus . In cuius rei
testimonium presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui . Testibus . domino Nicholao Corbeth
domino Roberto de Nesbithe . domino Nicholao de Ruthirforde . et aliis .

p.cl: To all who shall see or listen to this writing Robert son of Alexander of London sends greeting in the Lord.

Know me to have allowed and by this my present charter to have made firm to God and to the church of blessed Mary at Melrose and to the monks serving God in that place, in free, pure and perpetual alms, the donation that my father made of his land situated in ‘Lekehalu’, which was given to him by Walter de Burdon and Mabel, his wife, as an exchange, just as my father’s charter bears witness.
I and my heirs shall warrant and defend the whole of the said land, with all its liberties and easements, against all men and women.
In testimony of this matter I have applied my seal to this document.
As witnesses, the lord Nicholas Corbet, the lord Robert of Nisbet, the lord Nicholas of Rutherford, and others.
